best_variant.label: Metal center optimization
best_variant.description: Tune first-shell ligands to favor high-valent metal-oxo species.

mutations.note: 2-His-1-carboxylate style motif for non-heme Fe chemistry

best_variant.rationale: C-H activation requires high-valent oxidants; first-shell ligands tune redox potential.
best_variant.strain_note: structural localization required; conservative strain floor applied
best_variant.objective: Improve retention without breaking access or reach.

assumptions: strain floor applied for structural localization
mechanism mismatch penalty applied to barrier

gate residue to increase retention near the catalyst

candidate.rationale: C-H activation requires high-valent oxidants; first-shell ligands tune redox potential.
candidate.strain_note: structural localization required; conservative strain floor applied

veto_rules: Abort if negative control shows >5% conversion.

variance_rules: Repeat any arm with >20% replicate variance.
Flag arms with inconsistent pH drift (>0.3).
